ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the business address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the business */,
  "tax_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax code associated with the business */,
  "business_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business certificate */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the business */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued to the business */,
  "license_issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., sole proprietorship, partnership, corporation) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_business_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_certificate_id") REFERENCES business_certificates ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_tax_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_code_id") REFERENCES tax_codes ("tax_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the business owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the business owner */,
  "owner_city" TEXT /* City of the business owner's address */,
  "owner_state" TEXT /* State of the business owner's address */,
  "owner_zip" TEXT /* Postal code of the business owner's address */,
  "owner_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the business owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_codes" (
  "tax_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tax code */,
  "tax_code" TEXT /* Tax code string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax code */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the certificate */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number issued to the business */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate expires */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of certificate (e.g., food service, health department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business applying for a license */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was reviewed */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the business (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., main, branch, warehouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_locations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being complained about */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., noise, health, safety) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being cited for the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was issued */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., health, safety, zoning) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
